title: SWS3022 AI/ML for Financial Services
summary: A financial services workshop introducing AI/ML methods, financial data, fintech dashboards, web applications, and future financial systems such as Finternet.

title: CG2111A Engineering Principles and Practice II
summary: A computer engineering design course where students build real-world systems involving information processing, interfacing, scaling, safety, security, sustainability, and fault-tolerant design.

title: CG2271 Real-Time Operating Systems
summary: An RTOS course covering tasks, scheduling algorithms, RTOS customisation, and concurrent real-time programming.

title: SWS3009 Robotics and Machine Learning
summary: A summer workshop with concurrent robotics and deep learning tracks, covering microcontroller interfacing, sensing, actuation, decision-making, and Python/C programming foundations.
